历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10861 → 12544 → 13934 → 12536 → 17446, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 4910 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 17446. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 133/133/133/123 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 142 in 2025, and is planned to be 153 in 2026, an expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly due to incidents of humanistic care such as a master's graduate thanking the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, with 6 positive signals. Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, which has a moderate boost on application attention. Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, among which Grass Science and Ecology are top nationally, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Grass Science, Ecology, and Atmospheric Science, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information enrollment directions. Chemistry, Biology, Environment, and Materials majors are still clearly discouraged, and the university's Chemistry, Environmental Science and Engineering majors are affected by this low popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, with Physics Category estimated at about 248,031 based on the recent proportion of about 63%, basically unchanged from 2025's 249,802, indicating a stable competition landscape. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.
7. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the continuous decline in historical rankings, the expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan by about 7.7% in 2026 (easing competition), a generally positive reputation (boosting attention), and a basically stable number of candidates, considering the buffering effect of enrollment expansion on ranking upward movement, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 18287, with a range of 17787–18787.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<17787), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Stomatology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>18787), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and pair with other universities as safety.
